strengths: 19 years of diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure with exposure to multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated entrepreneurial capability as GISCollective founder since 2016, showing ability to build and sustain independent products
Strong track record of technical knowledge sharing through conferences, workshops, and mentorship activities
concerns: AI expertise is recent and limited—only 6 months at re:cinq working on AI agent infrastructure, lacking the recognized deep AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products the role requires
Unexplained 8-month career gap (October 2025–June 2026) following brief AI-focused role raises questions about stability and commitment
Resume demonstrates hands-on senior full-stack developer background rather than director-level strategic thinking, customer advisory work, or platform innovation leadership
response.justification: Szabo brings strong technical fundamentals and entrepreneurial drive, but is significantly underqualified for this director-level AI strategy role. His recent exposure to AI infrastructure lacks the depth and demonstrated product track record this position requires. His background as a senior full-stack developer does not translate to the strategic vision, platform innovation, and customer advisory responsibilities of a principal engineer focused on AI platform strategy. The unexplained career gap compounds concerns about readiness for this level of responsibility.
